data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Streamlines the user decision-making process by minimizing menu options.
data.technical_spec: Design patterns focusing on simplicity and primary features upfront.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes actionable elements for easier interaction and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Big buttons and touch-targets for mobile-friendliness.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Groups information in chunks for easier cognitive processing.
data.technical_spec: Segmented feeds and stories to enhance content digestibility.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Enhances user experience by focusing on memorable interaction peaks.
data.technical_spec: Designing interactive stories and posts that highlight user-crafted content.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Ensures users' experience is familiar across different platforms.
data.technical_spec: UI consistency with design elements on Facebook and other apps.
